methods.description: Process for collecting surface mud samples from the estuaries of the new Yongding River and the Haihe River.

steps.description: The surface mud samples were taken from the estuaries of the two main rivers, the new Yongding River (117°57′21″E, 39°12′58″N) and the Haihe River (117°42′53″E, 38°59′22″N).
steps.searchable_summary: Collect surface mud samples from specified river estuary locations.

methods.description: Process for preparing diatom slides from mud samples, identifying and counting diatoms under a microscope, and calculating their relative percentages.

steps.description: Diatom slices were made in the laboratory...
steps.searchable_summary: Prepare diatom slides from collected mud samples in the laboratory.
Identify diatom species on slides using an optical microscope at 400x magnification.
outputs: Identified diatom species list per sample

steps.description: More than 200 diatoms were counted in each sample...
steps.searchable_summary: Count more than 200 diatoms in each sample.

steps.description: ...and the percentages of diatoms of different species and genera were calculated.
steps.searchable_summary: Calculate the percentage abundance of different diatom species and genera.
outputs: Percentage abundance of diatom species and genera
